Module 3 - Quick Launch
Case Study - Will Falconer
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 4 --

Overview
▪ 	Will Falconer, DVM - Veterinarian for 35+ years… specialty -
homeopathic medicine
▪ 	Email list: approximately 8,000
▪ 	Existing product: e-book and Audio book bundle for $45 (“Vital
Animals Don’t Get Heartworms!” The Drug Free Prevention
Program That Works)
▪ 	Quick Launch: Offered a “nearly 50% off” sale on an e-book/
audiobook combo that had been slowly selling for over a year. Some
days one or two sales, some days none.
Module 3: Quick Launch Case Study
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 4 --

Overview
▪ 	New bundle: Added (to the e-book and audio book) a bonus Special
Report and a one-hour Q&A webinar.
▪ 	Special offer price: $25
▪ 	Sent 6 emails over 4 days - Over the Memorial Day holiday weekend
(in the U.S.)
